candidate_universe: Only Wave39, Wave40 or Wave41 candidates whose unchanged frozen version passes both the registered 2023 and 2024 gates.
selection_rule: Maximize the minimum 32bp net log growth across calendar years 2023 and 2024.
Then maximize the minimum quarter net log growth across all eight 2023-2024 quarters at 24bp.
Then maximize the minimum annual 40bp net log growth across 2023 and 2024.
Then minimize the maximum annual top-10-winner share at 24bp.
Then maximize the minimum annual net growth after removing the five largest winning trades at 24bp.
If still tied exactly, choose the numerically smaller wave number.
not_selection_inputs: 2025 or later prices, signals or outcomes
post_selection_steps: Reconstruct the champion's complete 2022-2024 causal signal and execution ledger with entry, stop, exit, funding, costs and official source-gap state.
Select a fixed risk fraction, leverage cap and manual trading-account/bank-account allocation using only 2022-2024 block bootstrap and capacity constraints.
Freeze code, data hashes, candidate, execution, risk and treasury policy.
Only then permit one sealed terminal OOS execution.
